_doc: Built-in playbook seed corpus for Batitong Phase 2B.
Loaded by `python manage.py seed_playbooks`. Idempotent: matched by slug.
Each entry MUST set is_built_in=True (workspace=null in DB).
Steps where the tool is missing are skipped at seed time with a warning.

playbooks.name: Recon · Active scan (quick)
playbooks.description: Lightweight active scan to enumerate live hosts + open ports + top vulnerabilities on a single target.

steps.title: TCP top-1000 scan
steps.rationale: Fast initial sweep to find live hosts + open services.

steps.title: High-rate port discovery
steps.rationale: Confirm Nmap findings + catch services Nmap missed.

steps.title: Templated vulnerability triage
steps.rationale: Surface low-hanging CVEs + misconfigs on detected services.

playbooks.name: Recon · Passive subdomain enumeration
playbooks.description: Stack passive sources to map a domain's external surface area.

steps.title: Passive sources via subfinder
steps.rationale: Aggregate dozens of OSINT feeds in one shot.

steps.title: Cross-check with assetfinder
steps.rationale: Catch subdomains subfinder missed (different feed mix).

steps.title: Active DNS resolution + amass
steps.rationale: Resolve candidates + walk DNS records to pivot.

playbooks.name: Recon · OSINT (people + emails)
playbooks.description: Gather emails, employee names, and exposed metadata using theHarvester.

steps.title: theHarvester OSINT sweep
steps.rationale: Pull emails, hostnames, and IPs from public sources.

playbooks.name: Web Audit · SQL injection (T1190)
playbooks.description: Discover endpoints, fingerprint, then probe for SQLi via sqlmap.

steps.title: Directory + file brute-force
steps.rationale: Map reachable endpoints before probing for injection.

steps.title: Nuclei: sqli + reflected templates
steps.rationale: Quickly fingerprint candidate vulnerable parameters.

steps.title: sqlmap on suspicious endpoints
steps.rationale: Confirm + exploit injection points (HIGH RISK — needs approval).

playbooks.name: Web Audit · Content discovery
playbooks.description: Brute-force directories, files, and virtual hosts using ffuf + gobuster.

steps.title: ffuf: directory wordlist
steps.rationale: Fast HTTP fuzzer for hidden paths.

steps.title: gobuster: virtual host enumeration
steps.rationale: Enumerate vhosts to discover staging / dev sites on same IP.

playbooks.name: Web Audit · CMS fingerprint + audit
playbooks.description: Detect WordPress/Joomla and run targeted audits.

steps.title: Nikto baseline scan
steps.rationale: General-purpose web server findings.

steps.title: WPScan (WordPress)
steps.rationale: WordPress-specific vulnerabilities and user enumeration.

steps.title: JoomScan (Joomla)
steps.rationale: Joomla-specific issues — runs only if site is Joomla.

playbooks.name: AD Audit · SMB share enumeration
playbooks.description: Enumerate accessible SMB shares + users on a Windows host.

steps.title: enum4linux-ng baseline
steps.rationale: Pull users/groups/shares + OS info via SMB null session.

steps.title: smbmap share enum
steps.rationale: Confirm share read/write + map filesystem.

playbooks.name: AD Audit · Credential spray (HIGH RISK)
playbooks.description: Spray a small known list against AD to identify weak passwords. Requires approval.

steps.title: Enumerate user list
steps.rationale: Build a target list before spraying.

steps.title: netexec password spray
steps.rationale: Spray a common password against the user list (HIGH RISK).

playbooks.name: AD Audit · Secretsdump (CRITICAL)
playbooks.description: Dump cached credentials from a compromised host. Requires approval; treat output as sensitive.

steps.title: Impacket secretsdump
steps.rationale: Pull SAM/LSA/NTDS hashes (HIGHLY DESTRUCTIVE — needs Admin approval).

playbooks.name: Lateral Movement · psexec (HIGH RISK)
playbooks.description: Execute commands on a remote host via SMB once admin creds are known.

steps.title: Impacket psexec
steps.rationale: Run a command remotely (HIGH RISK — needs approval, leaves an event log).

playbooks.name: Credential Access · Hash cracking
playbooks.description: Crack captured hashes offline with john + hashcat.

steps.title: John the Ripper (initial pass)
steps.rationale: Fast first pass with default rules.

steps.title: hashcat (rule-based pass)
steps.rationale: GPU-friendly second pass with rockyou + rules.

playbooks.name: Comprehensive · HexStrike recon planner
playbooks.description: Hand off planning to HexStrike's planner + run its recon agent.

steps.title: HexStrike planner
steps.rationale: Generate a recon plan tailored to the target.

steps.title: HexStrike run_recon
steps.rationale: Execute the recon plan.
